title: HeadyOS — AI Operating System for Every Device
description: HeadyOS is the cross-platform sovereign AI runtime that brings the full Heady agent stack to web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and edge devices. Local inference, persistent memory, quantum-safe security — no cloud required.
ogTitle: HeadyOS — Your Devices Just Got a Brain
ogDescription: The sovereign AI operating layer for every device. Local inference, 17-Swarm agent orchestration, quantum-safe enclave, and φ-scaled scheduling — from Raspberry Pi to enterprise Linux.
twitterDescription: Cross-platform. Local inference. Persistent agents. Quantum-safe. HeadyOS brings sovereign intelligence to any device.

structuredData.name: HeadyOS
structuredData.description: Cross-platform AI agent runtime operating system with local inference and quantum-safe security.
